channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Demand surges for Alex Newhook jerseys as Canadiens playoff success boosts Habs excitement in St. John’s
item.description: Interest in St. John’s-born NHL player Alex Newhook has surged across Newfoundland and Labrador following his standout performance with the Montreal Canadiens in the Stanley Cup playoffs. After Newhoo...

item.title: Sydney Opera House CEO discusses venue use and repair costs following TISM performances
item.description: Sydney Opera House chief executive Louise Herron has reflected on recent operational and maintenance challenges following a series of performances by alternative rock group TISM in the Concert Hall. T...

item.title: Philippine Health Secretary's Election as World Health Assembly President: Turning Global Role into Domestic Health Reforms
item.description: Dr. Teodoro Herbosa, the Philippine Secretary of Health, was elected president of the 78th World Health Assembly in 2025, marking a rare moment where a sitting Philippine health official holds a key p...

item.title: Erling Haaland Wins Premier League Golden Boot After Scoring 27 Goals for Manchester City
item.description: Erling Haaland has once again established himself as one of the most dangerous strikers in English football after finishing as the top scorer in the English Premier League. The Norwegian forward score...

item.title: Opinion Essay Argues Supreme Court Voting Rights Decisions Are Deepening Political Divisions

item.title: Cruise travellers can explore Chongqing’s rivers, pandas and historic attractions
item.description: This travel feature outlines what cruise passengers can expect when visiting Chongqing, one of China’s largest and fastest-growing cities. The article explains that most Yangtze River cruises between ...

item.title: Trump Administration Accused of Weakening CFTC Oversight of Prediction Markets
item.description: A report published by The New York Times and highlighted by Raw Story alleges that the Trump administration has reshaped the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in ways that favor online predi...

item.title: Elsies River family appeals for online harassment against nine-year-old girl to stop
item.description: A family from Elsies River in Cape Town has appealed to the public to stop harassing their nine-year-old daughter, Shenikah Jacobs, after social media users wrongly claimed she was missing child Joshl...

item.title: Study finds around 1.5 lakh AI-generated fake citations entered scientific literature in 2025
item.description: A recent large-scale academic study has raised serious concerns about the integrity of scientific publishing, estimating that nearly 1.5 lakh AI-generated fake citations entered the scientific record ...

item.title: Interlake First Nations allege lack of consultation over access restrictions to traditional hunting territory near Lake St. Martin
item.description: First Nations in Manitoba’s Interlake region are accusing the provincial government of failing to consult them before installing a gravel blockade that restricted access to traditional hunting and har...

item.title: Federal High Court Voids Parts of INEC 2027 Election Timetable Over Electoral Act Violations
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja has nullified some sections of the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) revised timetable for the 2027 general elections, saying the electoral body acted be...

item.title: Prime Minister Carney Highlights Canada’s Preparation for 2026 FIFA World Cup During Ottawa Event
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney hosted a ceremonial event in Ottawa on Sunday to welcome FIFA President Gianni Infantino, marking Canada’s increasing involvement in preparations for the 2026 FIFA World Cup...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns clinch CAF Champions League after 1-1 draw with FAR Rabat
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns of South Africa don secure another CAF Champions League title after playing a 1-1 draw with FAR Rabat in Morocco on Sunday, completing a 2-1 aggregate victory from both legs of the f...

item.title: Six smart kitchen gadgets designed to simplify home cooking and daily routines
item.description: This article explores a range of modern kitchen gadgets designed to make home cooking more automated, efficient, and less time-consuming. The trend highlighted is the rise of hands-free and AI-powered...

item.title: US and Iran advance towards draft agreement to de-escalate Middle East conflict and reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States and Iran are reportedly moving closer to a potential agreement aimed at ending ongoing hostilities in the Middle East, with senior officials suggesting that a deal could be finalised...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Results Released for May 24, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN News published a brief report containing the lotto results for May 24, 2026, based on information from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). The article was released at 10:23 PM PH...

item.title: RAF aircraft carrying Defence Secretary John Healey experienced GPS jamming near Russian border

item.title: CBSE re-evaluation portal issues prompt IIT and PSU bank intervention amid student complaints and admission concerns
